Class SchemaJavaProgramFactory

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaProgramFactory
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.SchemaJavaProgramFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeListener, EventListener, ProgramFactory, Service
public class SchemaJavaProgramFactory extends JavaProgramFactory
